name: view scope games played column override post
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('POST') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2022, 2023) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2022, 2023) group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count as games_played_0, CASE WHEN player.dob IS NULL OR player.dob = '0000-00-00' THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(opening_days.opening_day, TO_DATE(player.dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) + (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM AGE(opening_days.opening_day, TO_DATE(player.dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 12.0) + (EXTRACT(DAY FROM AGE(opening_days.opening_day, TO_DATE(player.dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 365.25), 2) END as age_0, "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" on "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "opening_days" on "opening_days"."year" = "player_years"."year" where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count, player.dob, opening_days.opening_day, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
